props.title: Between ArXiv and Polymarket: The Queryable Layer Researchers Didn't Have

props.text: Hugging Face, Kaggle, Metaculus, Polymarket — every research archive that outlived its first wave learned to be queryable. PR #69 (merged today, eighth surface over `sim_dir/`) is the first index across MiroShark's seven prior renderers — the gallery of agent-debate simulations now filters by consensus, quality, outcome, sort, and free-text search, all composing via URL params. The interesting move is what filter vocabulary an emerging artifact class inherits — and PR #69 is the first version of that vocabulary for agent-based opinion dynamics simulations, deployed in 300 lines of stdlib.
